seo.title: Laravel implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Laravel projects safely.

content.intro: A comprehensive technical audit for deploying Laravel applications to production environments, ensuring security, performance, and reliability.

items.title: Disable Debug Mode
items.description: Verify that APP_DEBUG is set to false in the production .env file to prevent stack traces and sensitive environment variables from being exposed.

items.title: Generate Application Key
items.description: Ensure APP_KEY is set to a unique 32-character string via 'php artisan key:generate' to secure session cookies and encrypted data.

items.title: Enforce HTTPS
items.description: Use URL::forceScheme('https') in the AppServiceProvider boot method and ensure the TRUSTED_PROXIES configuration is set for load balancers.

items.title: Secure Session Cookies
items.description: Set SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE to true and SESSION_HTTP_ONLY to true in config/session.php to prevent cross-site scripting and man-in-the-middle attacks.

items.title: Configure Rate Limiting
items.description: Apply the 'throttle' middleware to all authentication and API routes in routes/web.php and routes/api.php to mitigate brute-force attacks.

items.title: Cache Configuration
items.description: Execute 'php artisan config:cache' during the deployment process to combine all configuration files into a single cached file.

items.title: Cache Routes
items.description: Execute 'php artisan route:cache' to reduce the overhead of route registration, especially in applications with hundreds of routes.

items.title: Optimize Autoloader
items.description: Run 'composer install --optimize-autoloader --no-dev' to ensure the PHP class map is pre-built for faster class loading.

items.title: Pre-compile Blade Views
items.description: Execute 'php artisan view:cache' to pre-compile Blade templates so they do not need to be compiled on the first request.

items.title: Detect N+1 Queries
items.description: Use Model::preventLazyLoading(!app()->isProduction()) during development to ensure all production queries are properly eager-loaded with the 'with' method.

items.title: Set Persistent Queue Driver
items.description: Change QUEUE_CONNECTION from 'sync' to a persistent driver like 'redis' or 'database' in the production environment.

items.title: Configure Supervisor
items.description: Create a Supervisor configuration file to manage the 'php artisan queue:work' process and ensure it automatically restarts if it crashes.

items.title: Implement Horizon
items.description: If using Redis, install Laravel Horizon and verify the dashboard access is restricted via a Gate in the HorizonServiceProvider.

items.title: Define Job Timeouts
items.description: Explicitly set the $timeout and $tries properties on job classes to prevent long-running processes from hanging worker threads.

items.title: Failed Job Monitoring
items.description: Ensure the failed_jobs table is migrated and configure a notification listener for the JobFailed event.

items.title: Automate Migrations
items.description: Include 'php artisan migrate --force' in the deployment script to update the database schema without manual intervention.

items.title: Establish Backup Routine
items.description: Configure 'spatie/laravel-backup' to perform daily database dumps and upload them to an external S3 bucket.

items.title: Link Public Storage
items.description: Run 'php artisan storage:link' on the production server to make files in 'storage/app/public' accessible via the 'public/storage' URL.

items.title: Redis Eviction Policy
items.description: Verify that the Redis instance used for caching has the 'maxmemory-policy' set to 'allkeys-lru' to prevent memory overflow.

items.title: Database Indexing
items.description: Run a query audit to ensure all columns used in 'where', 'order by', and 'join' clauses have appropriate database indexes.

items.title: Centralized Error Tracking
items.description: Integrate an external service like Sentry, Flare, or Bugsnag to capture production exceptions and notify the team.

items.title: Log Rotation Configuration
items.description: Set LOG_CHANNEL to 'daily' or 'syslog' in .env to prevent the application log file from growing indefinitely and consuming disk space.

items.title: Health Check Endpoint
items.description: Create a route that verifies database connectivity, cache availability, and disk space, returning a non-200 status on failure.

items.title: Performance Monitoring
items.description: Install Laravel Pulse or an APM like New Relic to monitor slow routes, high-memory jobs, and database bottlenecks.

items.title: Audit Sensitive Actions
items.description: Implement a logging mechanism for high-risk actions such as user deletions, permission changes, or data exports.

items.title: Production Asset Build
items.description: Run 'npm run build' to generate minified and versioned CSS and JS files via Vite or Laravel Mix.

items.title: Tailwind CSS Purge
items.description: Verify that the Tailwind configuration includes all relevant Blade and JS paths to ensure unused CSS is stripped from the production build.

items.title: Manage SSR Processes
items.description: If using Inertia.js with Server-Side Rendering, ensure the 'php artisan inertia:start-ssr' process is managed by Supervisor.

items.title: Content Security Policy
items.description: Implement CSP headers to restrict the sources from which scripts and styles can be loaded, reducing XSS risks.

items.title: CDN Integration
items.description: Configure the ASSET_URL in .env to point to a CDN for serving static assets to reduce load on the application server.
